title: diospyros lotus var. glabra
intro: Diospyros lotus var. glabra is a variety of the date palm Diospyros lotus, commonly known as the fruit-bearing persimmon or oriental persimmon. It is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the Middle East and the Mediterranean region, valued for its medicinal properties and edible fruit. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, diarrhea, and inflammation, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Diospyros lotus var. glabra can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to promote digestion and relieve respiratory issues.
